<br/>

**Metal Forage** is a free, open-source GitHub README component generator with a 44-metal SVG engine.
Build stunning profile READMEs with metallic banners, animated cards, badges, skill trees, terminals and more вҖ” no code needed.

**[вҶ’ Open the App](https://metal-forage.vercel.app)** В· **[вҶ’ API Reference](#-api-reference)** В· **[вҶ’ Built by Natraj-X](https://www.natrajx.in/)**

</div>

---

## вңҰ What is Metal Forage?

Metal Forage generates **edge-rendered SVG components** for GitHub READMEs via a simple URL API. Every component is a plain `![alt](url)` markdown image вҖ” no JavaScript, no iframes, no GitHub Actions needed.

```md
<!-- Drop any Metal Forage URL into your README like this: -->
![My Banner](https://metal-forage.vercel.app/api/banner?text=Hello+World&metal=gold)
```

> **Built by [Natraj-X](https://www.natrajx.in/)** вҖ” an AI & IT engineering agency specialising in ML pipelines, data engineering, and full-stack product development.

---

## вңҰ Features

| | |
|---|---|
| рҹҺЁ **44 Metal Themes** | Chrome, Gold, Neon-Green, Rose-Gold, Plasma, Electric, Holographic and 37 more |
| рҹ§© **16 Component Types** | Banners, Cards, Buttons, Badges, Headers, Footers, Dividers, Text FX, Progress Bars, Terminals, Social Links, Logo Containers, Image Frames and more |
| вҡЎ **Edge Runtime** | All SVGs rendered on Vercel Edge вҖ” globally fast, zero cold starts |
| рҹҺӯ **28 Design Styles** | Cyber-grid, Glassmorphic, Neumorphic, Hologram, Neon-sign, Retro-wave and more |
| вңЁ **20+ Text Animations** | Typewriter, glitch, neon-pulse, wave, matrix-rain, hologram-flicker and more |
| рҹ–ҢпёҸ **Custom Gradients** | Pass any hex colors as a comma-separated list вҖ” overrides the metal theme |
| рҹ”— **Pure Markdown** | Every component is a plain `![]()` image вҖ” works everywhere GitHub renders markdown |
| рҹҶ“ **Free Forever** | No account, no API key, no rate limits (fair use) |

---

## вңҰ Components

### 1. Banner

```
GET /api/banner
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `text` | string | `METALFORGE` | Main heading text |
| `sub` | string | вҖ” | Subtitle text |
| `metal` | string | `chrome` | Metal theme name |
| `colors` | string | вҖ” | Comma-separated hex override e.g. `#ff0000,#0000ff` |
| `angle` | number | `135` | Gradient angle |
| `style` | string | `default` | Design style (28 options) |
| `width` | number | `800` | SVG width px |
| `height` | number | `160` | SVG height px |
| `theme` | `dark\|light` | `dark` | Color theme |
| `anim` | string | вҖ” | Text animation effect |
| `bg` | string | вҖ” | Background override |
| `fontFamily` | string | `Orbitron` | Font family |

**Example:**
```md
![Banner](https://metal-forage.vercel.app/api/banner?text=MY+PROJECT&sub=Built+with+love&metal=neon-green&style=cyber-grid&width=800)
```

---

### 2. Stat Card

```
GET /api/card
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `title` | string | `GitHub Stats` | Card title |
| `value` | string | вҖ” | Main value displayed |
| `metal` | string | `chrome` | Metal theme |
| `style` | string | `default` | Design style |
| `width` | number | `320` | Width px |
| `height` | number | `160` | Height px |
| `icon` | string | вҖ” | Icon name |
| `theme` | `dark\|light` | `dark` | Color theme |

Also available: `/api/card-neo` (neumorphic) and `/api/card-glass` (glassmorphic).

---

### 3. Button

```
GET /api/button
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `label` | string | `Click me` | Button label |
| `metal` | string | `chrome` | Metal theme |
| `style` | string | `metallic` | One of 16 button styles |
| `width` | number | `200` | Width px |
| `height` | number | `48` | Height px |
| `icon` | string | вҖ” | Icon |
| `theme` | `dark\|light` | `dark` | Color theme |

**Usage in README (clickable):**
```md
[![Deploy](https://metal-forage.vercel.app/api/button?label=Deploy+Now&metal=neon-green&style=metallic)](https://your-link.com)
```

> The actual link goes in the outer `[...]()` вҖ” SVG buttons can't have `href` inside them in GitHub READMEs.

---

### 4. Badge

```
GET /api/badge
```

| Param | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `label` | string | `Label` | Left label |
| `value` | string | вҖ” | Right value |
| `metal` | string | `chrome` | Metal theme |
| `valueColor` | string | вҖ” | Override value text color |
| `shape` | string | `pill` | `pill \| sharp \| hex \| rounded \| flat` |

---

### 5. Text Animation

```
GET /api/text-anim
```

| Param | Type | Options |
|---|---|---|
| `text` | string | Any text |
| `effect` | string | `typewriter`, `glitch`, `neon-pulse`, `wave`, `matrix-rain`, `hologram-flicker`, `cyber-scan`, `pixel-dissolve`, `data-stream`, `lightning`, `fire`, `ice`, `aurora`, `portal`, `quantum`, `gravity-well`, `sound-wave`, `dna-helix`, `constellation`, `wormhole` |
| `metal` | string | Any metal name |
| `width` | number | вҖ” |
| `height` | number | вҖ” |

---

### 6. Progress Bar / Skill Tree

```
GET /api/progress-bar
GET /api/skill-tree
```

| Param | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `skills` | string | Comma-separated `Name:percent` e.g. `Python:90,TypeScript:85,Rust:60` |
| `metal` | string | Metal theme |
| `width` | number | Width px |
| `theme` | `dark\|light` | вҖ” |

**Example:**
```md
![Skills](https://metal-forage.vercel.app/api/skill-tree?skills=Python:90,TypeScript:85,Next.js:80&metal=neon-blue&width=400)
```

---

### 7. Terminal Block

```
GET /api/terminal
```

| Param | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `lines` | string | Pipe-separated lines e.g. `npm install\|npm run dev` |
| `title` | string | Terminal title bar text |
| `metal` | string | Metal theme |
| `width` | number | Width |
| `theme` | `dark\|light` | вҖ” |

---

### 8. Social Links

```
GET /api/social-links
```

| Param | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `links` | string | Comma-separated `platform:handle` e.g. `github:@yourusername,twitter:@you,linkedin:yourname` |
| `metal` | string | Metal theme |
| `style` | string | `pills \| icons \| minimal` |
| `width` | number | Width |

---

### 9. Header / Footer

```
GET /api/header
GET /api/footer
```

Full page-header and page-footer SVGs. Params: `name`, `title`, `metal`, `style`, `width`, `theme`.

---

### 10. Divider

```
GET /api/divider
```

| Param | Description |
|---|---|
| `style` | `wave \| zigzag \| dots \| straight \| double \| gradient` |
| `metal` | Metal theme |
| `width` | Width px |
| `height` | Height px |

---

## вңҰ Metal Themes

<details>
<summary>View all 44 metal themes</summary>

| Group | Names |
|---|---|
| **Classic** | `chrome`, `gold`, `silver`, `bronze`, `copper`, `iron` |
| **Neon** | `neon-green`, `neon-blue`, `neon-pink`, `neon-orange`, `neon-yellow` |
| **Aurora** | `aurora`, `aurora-blue`, `aurora-green` |
| **Cyber** | `electric`, `plasma`, `holographic`, `matrix`, `cyber` |
| **Pastel** | `rose-gold`, `pearl`, `lavender`, `mint`, `peach` |
| **Material** | `obsidian`, `titanium`, `platinum`, `tungsten` |
| **Retro** | `rust`, `brass`, `patina`, `verdigris` |
| **Y2K** | `y2k-silver`, `y2k-blue`, `y2k-pink` |
| **Pixel** | `pixel-gold`, `pixel-chrome` |
| **Neutral** | `steel`, `graphite`, `ash` |

</details>

## вңҰ Quick Start вҖ” Copy-Paste Profile README

Here's a full starter profile README you can copy and personalise:

```md
<!-- Banner -->
![Banner](https://metal-forage.vercel.app/api/banner?text=YOUR+NAME&sub=Full+Stack+Developer&metal=chrome&style=cyber-grid&width=900)

<!-- Badges -->
![Profile Views](https://metal-forage.vercel.app/api/badge?label=Views&value=1k&metal=neon-green&shape=pill)
![Open to Work](https://metal-forage.vercel.app/api/badge?label=Status&value=Open+to+Work&metal=gold&shape=pill)

<!-- Skills -->
![Skills](https://metal-forage.vercel.app/api/skill-tree?skills=TypeScript:90,Python:85,Next.js:80,AWS:70&metal=neon-blue&width=500)

<!-- Terminal -->
![Terminal](https://metal-forage.vercel.app/api/terminal?title=~/me&lines=whoami:+fullstack+dev|focus:+AI+%26+web+products|currently:+building+cool+stuff&metal=matrix&width=500)

<!-- Social Links -->
![Social](https://metal-forage.vercel.app/api/social-links?links=github:@yourusername,twitter:@yourtwitter,linkedin:yourname&metal=chrome&width=500)

<!-- Divider -->
![Divider](https://metal-forage.vercel.app/api/divider?style=wave&metal=gold&width=900)
```

## вңҰ Project Structure

```
src/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ app/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ api/                   # 18 edge API routes (one per component)
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ banner/route.ts
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ card/route.ts
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ badge/route.ts
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ ...
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ layout.tsx             # SEO metadata + JSON-LD
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ page.tsx               # Main builder UI
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ sitemap.ts             # Auto-generated /sitemap.xml
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ robots.ts              # /robots.txt
в”ңв”Җв”Җ components/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Navbar.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Footer.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ShowcaseGrid.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ReadmeAssembler.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ builders/
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ BannerBuilder.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ CardBuilder.tsx
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ ui.tsx                 # Shared UI primitives
в””в”Җв”Җ lib/
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ metals.ts              # 44-metal engine + all SVG utilities
    в””в”Җв”Җ renderers/             # Per-component SVG renderers
        в”ңв”Җв”Җ banner.ts
        в”ңв”Җв”Җ card.ts
        в”ңв”Җв”Җ badge.ts
        в””в”Җв”Җ ...
```

---

## вңҰ Local Development

```bash
git clone https://github.com/your-username/metalforge.git
cd metalforge
npm install
npm run dev
# вҶ’ http://localhost:3000
```

**Requirements:** Node.js 18+, npm 9+

---

## вңҰ Deploying to Vercel

```bash
npm i -g vercel
vercel deploy
```

All routes use `export const runtime = 'edge'` вҖ” zero configuration needed on Vercel.
